releaseNotes:
• Important: this update requires a one-time uninstall. The app now ships with a dedicated release signing identity (replacing the brittle debug-keystore approach used through v1.16.x) so every future update installs cleanly without uninstalling. Android requires that signing identity to match across updates, which is why the v1.16.x → v1.17.0 transition needs a fresh install — but it's the last one you'll have to do.
• Before uninstalling: open Settings → Backup & Restore → Export, and save the JSON somewhere safe (Drive, Files, etc.). After installing v1.17.0, the Setup welcome screen has an "Import settings backup" button that brings your sources, favorites, last-watched, multi-view layout, and the rest back in one tap.
• Maintenance: No other functional changes. v1.17.x picks up from where v1.16.3 left off.
